subject: Your Ambrook subscription starts tomorrow
previewText: Quick heads-up on what to expect.
intro_text:
Hi {{ contact.firstname }},

 

Just a heads-up - your Ambrook free trial ends tomorrow, {{ trial_end_date }}. Since you have a card on file, your {{ plan_name }} subscription will begin automatically.
secondary_text:
What changes: Nothing, really. You'll keep full access to everything you've set up -- your chart of accounts, connected banks, tagged transactions, and reports. No data is lost, no settings change.

 

What to do if you need help: If there's anything about your setup you want to get right before your subscription starts, reply to this email. We'll make sure you're taken care of.

 

Best,

 

Paige Wyler
Head of Customer Success, Ambrook
